Why were Ibn Arabi's teachings controver: Me yasa koyarwar Ibn Arabi ta kasance mai cike da cece-kuce?
His doctrine of 'Wahdat al-Wujud' (Unity: Koyarwarsa ta 'Wahdat al-Wujud' (Unity of Being) wani lokaci ana fassara ta cikin kuskure a matsayin pantheism (cewa Allah shi ne sararin samaniya), wanda ya kai ga zargin bidi'a daga masana masu bin ma'anar zahiri ko na rikau.
Was Ibn Arabi a Sunni or a Shia?: Shin Ibn Arabi dan Sunni ne ko kuwa Shia?
He is generally considered a Sunni Musli: Ana kallon sa a matsayin musulmi dan Sunni wanda ya bi mazhabar shari'a ta Zahiri lokacin kuruciyarsa. Sai dai, koyarwarsa tana da zurfin gaske ta sufanci (esoteric) kuma galibi tana wuce iyakokin bangaranci, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan masana na al'adun Sunni da na Shia.
Goes into hiding in Lahijan after his fa: Ya shiga boye a Lahijan bayan an kashe mahaifinsa da yayansa.
Conquers Tabriz and is enthroned as Shah: Ya ci Tabriz da yaki sannan aka nada shi Shah na Azerbaijan yana da shekaru 14.
Declared Shah of Iran. Makes Twelver Shi: Ya zama Shah na Iran a hukumance. Ya mayar da Twelver Shi'ism ta zama addinin kasa.
Defeats the Uzbeks at the Battle of Merv: Ya kayar da Uzbeks a Yakin Merv, wanda ya kare iyakarsa ta gabas.
Suffers a decisive defeat against the Ot: Ya fuskanci kashi na karshe yaki da Daular Usmaniyya a Yakin Chaldiran.
He established the Safavid Empire, re-es: Ya kafa Daular Safavid, inda ya sake kafa daular gida ta Iranian wadda za ta yi mulki na tsawon karni biyu.
He made Twelver Shi'ism the official sta: Ya mayar da Twelver Shi'ism ta zama addinin kasa na hukumance na Iran, wani yanke shawara da ya tsara asalin addini da na kasa na Iran gaba daya.
Through military campaigns, he brought t: Ta hanyar yakokin soja, ya kawo yankuna daban-daban na plateau na Iran karkashin mulki guda daya na tsakiya a karon farko cikin karni da dama.
Why is Ismail I so important to Iranian: Me yasa Ismail I yake da matukar mahimmanci ga tarihin Iran?
He founded the Safavid dynasty, which ma: Ya kafa daular Safavid, wadda ke nuna farkon tarihin Iran na zamani, ya hada kasar wuri daya, sannan ya kafa asalin Shi'a wanda ke bayyana Iran har zuwa yau.
The Qizilbash ('Red Heads') were a coali: Qizilbash ('Red Heads') sun kasance hadakar kabilun Turkoman masu aminci wadanda ke da cikakken biyayya ga tsarin Safaviyya sannan suka kasance ginshikin sojojin Ismail.
What happened after the Battle of Chaldi: Menene ya faru bayan Yakin Chaldiran?
The defeat shattered Ismail's belief in: Kashin da ya fuskanci ya rusa imanin Ismail a kan cewa ba za a iya kayar da shi ba. Bai sake jagorantar sojoji da kansa zuwa yaki ba, ya janye daga gudanar da mulki na zahiri, kuma an ce ya fara shan giya.
Birth of Zarathushtra in northeastern Ir: Haihuwar Zarathushtra a arewa maso gabashin Iran ko yankunan da ke makwabtaka. Ainihin ranar da kuma wurin suna da muhawara tsakanin masana.
Receives his first revelation from Ahura: Ya sami wahayinsa na farko daga Ahura Mazda da Amesha Spentas (halittu na Allah) lokacin wani biki kusa da kogi.
Spends a decade preaching his new vision: Ya kwashe shekaru goma yana wa'azin sabon hangen nesansa ba tare da babban nasara ba, inda ya fuskanci tsanantawa da watsarwa daga al'ummarsa.
Travels to the court of King Vishtaspa i: Ya tafi fadar Sarki Vishtaspa a Bactria sannan ya sami nasarar shigar da shi addininsa, wanda ya samar masa da mai tallafi mai karfi ga bangaskiyarsa.
Death of Zarathushtra. Tradition holds t: Mutuwar Zarathushtra. Al'ada ta nuna cewa wani firist mai hamayya ne ya kashe shi lokacin da yake yin addu'a a cikin haikalin wuta (fire temple).
He established one of the world's first: Ya kafa daya daqun addinan farko na duniya na monotheistic da aka saukar, wanda ke da tsakiya a kan allahn hikima guda daya, watau Ahura Mazda.
He introduced the concept of a cosmic st: Ya shigo da ra'ayin yakin sararin samaniya tsakanin mai kyau (Asha) da mummuna (Druj), inda ya ba bil'adama damar zabi da kansu.
His ideas on monotheism, heaven, hell, a: Ra'ayoyinsa a kan monotheism, sama, jahannama, hukunci na karshe, da kuma mutum mai ceto (savior figure) ana amanna cewa sun yi tasiri a kan Judaism, Christianity, da kuma Musulunci.
Is Zarathushtra the same as Zoroaster?: Shin Zarathushtra daya yake da Zoroaster?
Yes. Zarathushtra is the name in the Ave: E. Zarathushtra shi ne suna a harshen Avestan, yayin da Zoroaster yake siffar fassarar harshen Girka (Greek transliteration), wadda ta fi shahara a cikin rubuce-rubucen Yamma.
Was Zoroastrianism the first monotheisti: Shin Zoroastrianism ce addini na farko na monotheistic?
It is considered one of the earliest, if: Ana kallon ta a matsayin daya daqun addinan farko na monotheistic da aka saukar, idan ma ba ita ce ta farko ba. Bunkasar ta ta rigayi ko kuma tana daidai da lokacin monotheism na Akhenaten a Egypt da kuma Judaism na farko.
The Gathas are a collection of 17 hymns,: Gathas tarin wakokin yabo ne guda 17, wadanda ake amanna cewa maganganun Zarathushtra ne da kansa. Suna samar da ainihin littafin mai tsarki na Zoroastrian, watau Avesta.
Born in Asadabad, with his exact birthpl: An haife shi a Asadabad, inda ainihin wurin haihuwarsa (Iran ko Afghanistan) yake batun muhawara ta tarihi.
Becomes an advisor to the ruler of Afgha: Ya zama mai ba da shawara ga sarkin Afghanistan, wanda ke nuna farkon shigarsa cikin siyasar kasa.
Resides in Egypt, where he influences a: Ya zauna a Egypt, inda ya yi tasiri a kan tsararraki na masana, ciki har da Muhammad Abduh, kafin a tura shi gudun hijira sakamakon matsin lamba na Birtaniya.
Co-founds the anti-colonial journal 'Al-: Ya kafa jaridar yaki da mulkin mallaka 'Al-Urwah al-Wuthqa' (The Firmest Bond) tare a Paris tare da Muhammad Abduh.
Active in Persia (Iran), his agitation a: Ya yi aiki a Persia (Iran), inda adawarsa da ba wa Birtaniya ikon taba (tobacco concession) ta Shah ta kai ga korarsa sannan ta taimaka wajen tayar da Zanga-zangar Taba (Tobacco Protest).
Invited to Istanbul by Sultan Abdul Hami: Sultan Abdul Hamid II ya gayyace shi zuwa Istanbul, inda ya ci gaba da zama karkashin tallafi da sanya ido na Sultan.
Dies of cancer in Istanbul. His remains: Ya mutu sakamakon cutar daji (cancer) a Istanbul. Daga baya an mayar da gawarsa zuwa Afghanistan a shekarar 1944.
He was a leading advocate for the politi: Ya kasance babban mai fada a kan hadin kan siyasa na daukacin Musulmai karkashin shugaba guda don yaki da mulkin mallaka na Turai.
He argued for a reinterpretation of Isla: Ya yi maganar sake fassara Musulunci ta yadda zai rungumi hankali da kimiyya ta zamani don farfado da al'ummomin musulmi.
Through his writings and speeches across: Ta hanyar rubuce-rubucensa da kalaman sa a daukacin duniyar Musulunci, ya zaburar da yunkurin yaki da mulkin mallaka da kishin kasa da dama.
It was a short-lived but highly influent: Ta kasance jarida ta yaki da mulkin mallaka wadda ba ta dade ba amma tana da matukar tasiri wadda ya buga ta tare da Muhammad Abduh a Paris. Ta bukaci hadin kan Musulunci, gyare-gyare, da kuma yaki da kasashen Turai, sannan aka haramta ta a yankunan da ke karkashin ikon Birtaniya kamar Egypt da India.
What was his relationship with Sultan Ab: Yaya alakar sa take da Sultan Abdul Hamid II?
The Sultan invited him to Istanbul to us: Sultan ya gayyace shi zuwa Istanbul don amfani da tasirinsa na Pan-Islamic don amfanin Daular Usmaniyya. Sai dai, alakar tana da sarkakiya; Sultan ya fara tsoron tsauraran ra'ayin al-Afghani sannan ya ajiye shi karkashin tsarewa a gida na zahiri har mutuwarsa.
An haife shi a Tus, Khorasan (Iran ta yanzu).
Active in Baghdad under the patronage of: Ya yi aiki a Baghdad karkashin tallafin dangin Barmakid, viziers ga Caliph Harun al-Rashid.
The Barmakid family falls from power. Ja: Dangin Barmakid sun rasa mulki. An ce an tsare Jabir a gida a Kufa.
Ya mutu a Kufa (Iraq ta yanzu).
His works, under the Latinized name 'Geb: Ayyukansa, karkashin sunan Latin 'Geber,' an fassara su sannan sun fara tasiri sosai a kan alchemical da kimiyya na Turai.
He championed a rigorous experimental ap: Ya jagoranci tsarin gwaje-gwaje na zahiri ga alchemy, wanda ya kafa ginshikin chemistry ta zamani.
He is credited with inventing or perfect: Ana yaba masa da kera ko kuma inganta alembic still, mai matukar mahimmanci ga distillation, da kuma sauran kayan aiki na dakin gwaje-gwaje.
He provided the first known recipes for: Ya samar da hanyoyin farko da aka sani don samar da mineral acids kamar nitric acid, sulfuric acid, da aqua regia.
He developed one of the earliest systems: Ya samar da daya daqun tsarin farko na rarraba abubuwa na sinadarai (chemical substances) bisa ga dabi'unsu.
Is Jabir ibn Hayyan a real historical fi: Shin Jabir ibn Hayyan mutum ne na gaske a tarihi?
Yes, he is considered a real person. How: E, ana kallon sa a matsayin mutum na gaske. Sai dai, babban tarin ayyuka da ake danganta su da shi, watau 'Jabirian corpus', kila shi da kansa da kuma makarantar mabiya ne suka rubuta shi na tsawon karni daya.
Was he an alchemist or a chemist?: Shin ya kasance alchemist ne ko kuwa chemist?
He was a transitional figure. While he w: Ya kasance mutum mai sauyin tsari. Duk da cewa ya yi aiki a cikin al'adar alchemical (misali, neman philosopher's stone), nacewarsa a kan gwaje-gwaje na tsari da za a iya maimaita su ya sanya shi zama babban ginshiki ga chemistry ta zamani.
It's the scholarly debate over the autho: Tana zama muhawara ta masana a kan marubucin dubban littattafai da ake dangantawa da Jabir. Yana da wuya a bambanta ayyukansa na gaske da wadanda aka rubuta daga baya ta hannun mabiyansa da sunansa.
The alembic still is arguably his most i: Alembic still za a iya cewa ita ce kirkirarsa mafi tasiri. Ta sauya tsarin distillation gaba daya, wani muhimmin tsari don raba ruwaye wanda har yanzu yake da tsakiya ga chemistry da masana'antu yau.
An haife shi a Diyarbakir, Daular Usmaniyya.
Moves to Istanbul to study and becomes i: Ya koma Istanbul don yin karatu sannan ya shiga cikin yunkurin juyin juya hali na Young Turk.
Becomes a leading member of the Committe: Ya zama babban mamba na Committee of Union and Progress (CUP) a Salonica, cibiyar ilimi ta yunkurin.
Begins publishing his influential articl: Ya fara buga rubuce-rubucensa masu tasiri a kan sociology da Turkism, wanda ya tsara akidar yunkurin.
Arrested by British occupation forces an: Sojojin mamaya na Birtaniya sun kama shi sannan aka tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Malta tare da sauran shugabannin kishin kasa na Ottoman.
Released from exile and joins the Turkis: An sake shi daga gudun hijira sannan ya shiga yunkurin kishin kasa na Turkish a Ankara lokacin Yakin Neman 'Yanci.
Publishes his seminal work, 'The Princip: Ya buga babban aikinsa, 'The Principles of Turkism' (Turkculugun Esaslari), wanda ya tsara akidarsa.
Dies in Istanbul, shortly after the foun: Ya mutu a Istanbul, jim kadan bayan kafa Jamhuriyar Turkey, wadda ra'ayoyinsa suka yi tasiri sosai a kanta.
Systematization of Turkish Nationalism: Tsara Kishin Kasa na Turkish a cikin Tsari
He is widely regarded as the 'father of: Ana kallon sa a ko'ina a matsayin 'uban kishin kasa na Turkish' saboda hada ra'ayoyin Turkic daban-daban zuwa akida dunkulalliya da aka sani da Turkism.
His ideas on secularism, populism, and n: Ra'ayoyinsa a kan secularism, populism, da kishin kasa sun samar da tsarin ilimi kai-tsaye ga da yawa daqun gyare-gyaren ginshiki na Mustafa Kemal Atatürk.
He developed a key sociological concept: Ya samar da wani muhimmin ra'ayi na sociology wanda ke bambanta 'al'ada' (ta kasa da ta ruhaniya) da kuma 'wayewa' (ta duniya da ta jiki), wanda ya jagoranci hanyar Turkey zuwa zamanantarwa.
Was Ziya Gökalp religious?: Shin Ziya Gokalp yana da addini?
While he was a strong advocate for a sec: Kodayake ya kasance babban mai fada a kan secular state inda aka raba addini da siyasa da doka, ya kalli Musulunci a matsayin bangare mai mahimmanci kuma mara rabuwa na al'adar kasa da asalin Turkish.
What was his relationship with Atatürk?: Yaya alakar sa take da Atatürk?
Gökalp was a major intellectual influenc: Gokalp ya yi babban tasiri na ilimi a kan Atatürk. Atatürk ya dauki kuma ya aiwatar da da yawa daqun ra'ayoyin Gokalp a kan kishin kasa, secularism, da zamanantarwa lokacin kafa Jamhuriyar Turkey.
What is 'Turkism' according to Gökalp?: Menene 'Turkism' kamar yadda Gokalp ya nuna?
Turkism, as defined by Gökalp, is an ide: Turkism, kamar yadda Gokalp ya bayyana ta, akida ce da ke inganta hadin kai na al'adu da na siyasa na mutanen Turkish. Tana jaddada harshe, tarihi, da al'ada na gama gari—ba wai yare ba—a matsayin ginshikin kasa.
Born in the village of Pari, near modern: An haife shi a kauyen Pari, kusa da Malayer ta yanzu, ga kabilar Zand.
Nader Shah is assassinated, plunging Ira: An kashe Nader Shah, wanda ya jefa Iran cikin yakin basasa. Karim Khan ya koma kasarsa sannan ya fara karfafa mulki.
Becomes a major contender for power in w: Ya zama babban mai neman mulki a yammacin Iran bayan kafa hadaka ta mutum uku (tripartite alliance).
Establishes Shiraz as his capital after: Ya kafa Shiraz a matsayin babban birninsa bayan ya kayar da daukacin abokan hamayyarsa sannan ya mallaki mafi yawan Iran. Ya karbi lakabin Vakil ol-Ro'aya (Regent of the People).
His reign is marked by peace and prosper: Mulkinsa yana da alamar zaman lafiya da wadata. Ya ba da umarnin gina manyan ayyukan gine-gine a Shiraz, ciki har da Arg na Karim Khan, Vakil Bazaar, da kuma Masallacin Vakil (Vakil Mosque).
Dies of natural causes in Shiraz. His de: Ya mutu sakamakon cuta ta dabi'a a Shiraz. Mutuwarsa ta haifar da rikicin gado wanda ya kai ga rushewar daular Zand.
He reunified most of Iran after the chao: Ya sake hada mafi yawan Iran bayan rikice-rikice na yakin basasa da suka biyo bayan mutuwar Nader Shah.
His nearly 30-year reign is remembered a: Ana tuna mulkinsa na kusan shekaru 30 a matsayin lokaci na musamman na kwanciyar hankali, adalci, da kuma bunkasar tattalin arziki ga mutanen Iran.
He transformed his capital, Shiraz, with: Ya sauya babban birninsa, Shiraz, da manyan ayyukan gine-gine sannan ya inganta bunkasar fasaha da al'adu.
Why did he refuse the title of 'Shah' (K: Me yasa ya ki karbar lakabin 'Shah' (Sarki)?
He preferred the title 'Vakil ol-Ro'aya': Ya fi zaba lakabin 'Vakil ol-Ro'aya' (Regent of the People) don nuna cewa ikonsa ya fito ne daga kuma ana amfani da shi a madadin mutanensa, yana jaddada tsarin mulki mai tawali'u da adalci.
What is his most famous building?: Menene ginin sa da ya fi shahara?
The Arg of Karim Khan, a large citadel l: Arg na Karim Khan, babban sansani (citadel) da ke tsakiyar Shiraz, wanda ya kasance masaukinsa da kuma cibiyar umarnin soja.
How did the Zand dynasty end?: Yaya daular Zand ta zo karshe?
After Karim Khan's death, his incompeten: Bayan mutuwar Karim Khan, magadansa marasa kwarewa sannan masu rikici sun raunana kasar, wanda ya ba wa Agha Mohammad Khan Qajar damar cin yankunansu da yaki sannan ya kafa daular Qajar.
Born in Constantinople (modern-day Istan: An haife shi a Constantinople (Istanbul ta yanzu).
Appointed as a clerk in the imperial arm: An nada shi a matsayin akawu a cikin tsarin kudi na sojojin daular a Anatolia.
Participated in Ottoman campaigns agains: Ya shiga cikin yakokin Ottoman yaki da Safavids a Persia, yana tafiya zuwa Baghdad da Hamadan.
Inherited a large fortune, which allowed: Ya gaji babban dukiya, wadda ta ba shi damar barin aikin gwamnati sannan ya nemi rayuwar ilimi.
Began compiling his monumental bibliogra: Ya fara tattara babban aikinsa na bibliographic, watau 'Kashf al-Zunun' (The Removal of Doubt from the Names of Books and Arts).
Began writing his major geographical wor: Ya fara rubuta babban aikinsa na labarin kasa, watau 'Jihannuma' (Mirror of the World).
Died in Constantinople, leaving several: Ya mutu a Constantinople, inda ya bar da yawa daqun manyan ayyukansa wadanda wasu suka kammala su.
Authored a massive bibliographic encyclo: Ya rubuta babban encyclopedia na bibliographic wanda ke tsara littattafai sama da 14,500 da marubuta 9,500 a harsunan Larabci, Farsi, da Turkish.
Wrote a groundbreaking universal geograp: Ya rubuta tarihin labarin kasa na duniya (universal geography) mai ban mamaki wanda ke hada bayanan Musulunci da na Turai, wanda ya zama na farko a duniyar Ottoman.
Compiled a comprehensive chronicle of Ot: Ya tattara cikakken tarihin Ottoman daga shekarar 1592 zuwa 1655, wanda ya kasance muhimmin tushe na tarihi.
Wrote 'The Balance of Truth,' a collecti: Ya rubuta 'The Balance of Truth,' tarin makaloli a kan batutuwan addini da tarbiyya masu cece-kuce, yana fada a kan tsarin amfani da hankali.
Why is he called Katip Çelebi?: Me yasa ake kiran sa Katip Celebi?
\"Katip\" means \"scribe\" or \"clerk,\": 'Katip' na nufin 'marubuci' ko 'akawu,' yana nuna farkon aikinsa a cikin gwamnatin Ottoman. 'Celebi' ya kasance lakabi na girmamawa mai nufin 'mutumin kirki' ko 'bawan Allah.' Ainihin sunansa shi ne Mustafa ibn Abdullah.
What makes his work 'Kashf al-Zunun' so: Menene ya sanya aikinsa 'Kashf al-Zunun' kasancewa mai matukar mahimmanci?
It is one of the most comprehensive bibl: Yana daya daqun mafi fadin aikin bibliographic na zamanin pre-modern, wanda ke samar da muhimman bayanai kan dubban littattafai da marubuta, wadanda da yawa a cikinsu yanzu sun bace ko kuma ba a cika samunsu ba.
Was Katip Çelebi only a historian?: Shin Katip Celebi masanin tarihi ne kawai?
No, he was a true polymath. He wrote ext: A'a, ya kasance masani (polymath) na gaske. Ya rubuta abubuwa da dama a kan labarin kasa, bibliography, tarbiyya, addini, da kimiyya, yana kokarin hada daukacin ilimin da ke akwai a zamaninsa.
How did his military service influence h: Yaya aikin sojansa ya shafi aikinsa?
His travels during military campaigns ex: Tafiye-tafiyensa lokacin yakin soja sun nuna masa yankuna daban-daban, al'adu, da dakunan karatu a fadin daular. Wannan kwarewa ta kai-tsaye, tare da asarar da ya gani, ta rura wutar burinsa na kiyaye da kuma tsara ilimi ga tsararraki masu zuwa.
Born to King Darius I and Atossa, a daug: An haife shi ga Sarki Darius I da Atossa, yar Cyrus Mai Girma.
Ascends to the throne of the Achaemenid: Ya hau karagar mulki ta Daular Achaemenid bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, Darius I.
Crushes a major revolt in Egypt, asserti: Ya murkushe babban bore a Egypt, wanda ya tabbatar da ikonsa.
Violently suppresses a revolt in Babylon: Ya murkushe bore da zafi a Babylon, inda ya kwace mutum-mutumi mai tsarki na Marduk.
Launches a massive invasion of Greece. W: Ya kaddamar da babban mamaya a Greece. Ya ci Yakin Thermopylae, ya lalata Athens, amma ya fuskanci kashi na karshe na sojojin ruwa a Yakin Salamis.
The Persian army left in Greece under hi: Sojojin Persian da aka bari a Greece karkashin janar dinsa Mardonius sun fuskanci kashi na karshe a Yakin Plataea, wanda ya kawo karshen mamayar.
Focuses on ambitious construction projec: Ya mayar da hankali a kan manyan ayyukan gine-gine, musamman a Persepolis da Susa, inda ya kammala gine-gine da dama wadanda mahaifinsa ya fara.
Assassinated in a palace conspiracy led: An kashe shi a wani makirci na fada karkashin jagorancin Artabanus, kwamandan dakarun tsaronsa na sarki.
Successfully quelled major rebellions in: Ya samu nasarar kwantar da manyan bore a Egypt da Babylon a farkon mulkinsa, wanda ya tabbatar da karkon daular.
Assembled one of the largest multination: Ya tara daya daqun sojoji mafi girma na kasashe daban-daban na duniyar da don yakin neman zabe yaki da kasashen birni na Greek.
Completed many of his father's building: Ya kammala da yawa daqun ayyukan gine-gine na mahaifinsa sannan ya fara nashi, wanda ya fadada kyakkyawan birnin Persepolis sosai.
Why is Xerxes often portrayed as a villa: Me yasa ake yawan nuna Xerxes a matsayin mugu ko sarki mai zalunci?
Most surviving historical accounts of hi: Mafi yawan bayanan tarihi da suka tsira na mamayarsa a Greece masana na Greek (kamar Herodotus) wadanda suka ci nasara ne suka rubuta su, wadanda a dabi'ance suka kwatanta shi a matsayin abokin gaba mai zalunci da girman kai don daukaka nasarar tasu.
Did Xerxes really have a bridge of boats: Shin da gaske Xerxes ya gina gadar jiragen ruwa a daukacin Hellespont?
Yes, this is a well-documented engineeri: E, wannan babban aikin injiniyanci ne da aka rubuta shi sosai. Injiniyoyinsa sun hada daruruwan jiragen ruwa wuri daya don samar da gadoji na pontoon guda biyu, wanda ya ba wa manyan sojojinsa damar tsallakawa daga Asiya zuwa Turai.
Xerxes was a follower of Zoroastrianism,: Xerxes ya kasance mabiya Zoroastrianism, addinin kasa na Daular Achaemenid, wanda ke da tsakiya a kan bautar allahn koli guda daya, watau Ahura Mazda. Ya ambaci Ahura Mazda a cikin rubuce-rubucensa na sarauta.
He was assassinated in 465 BCE in his be: An kashe shi a shekarar 465 BCE a cikin dakin kwanansa a matsayin bangare na makircin fada. Kila makircin an tsara shi ne ta hannun Artabanus, kwamandan dakarun tsaronsa, wanda ya rike mulki na takaitaccen lokaci kafin dansa na Xerxes, Artaxerxes I ya hambarar da shi.
Encounters Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Shakir,: Ya hadu da Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Shakir, wanda ya gayyace shi zuwa Baghdad don yin aiki a matsayin masani.
Joins the circle of scholars in Baghdad,: Ya shiga cikin rukunin masana a Baghdad, yana aiki karkashin tallafin Banu Musa da kuma daga baya Caliph al-Mu'tadid.
Produces major translations of Greek wor: Ya samar da manyan fassarori na ayyukan Girka (Euclid's Elements, Ptolemy's Almagest) da kuma rubuce-rubucensa na asali a kan lissafi, astronomy, da mechanics.
Dies in Baghdad, leaving a legacy carrie: Ya mutu a Baghdad, inda ya bar gado wanda dansa Sinan da jikansa Ibrahim suka ci gaba da shi.
Translated foundational Greek texts by E: Ya fassara rubuce-rubucen Girka na ginshiki ta hannun Euclid, Archimedes, Apollonius, da Ptolemy zuwa harshen Larabci, wanda ya sanya su kasance masu saukin shiga ga duniyar Musulunci.
Proposed a theory of the oscillation of: Ya ba da shawarar ka'idar motsin equinoxes don bayyana bambancin da ake gani a cikin precession rate.
Discovered a theorem for finding pairs o: Ya gano wata theorem don gano nau'ikan amicable numbers, wanda ya fadada aikin mutanen Girka na da.
Authored 'Kitab fi'l-qarastun' (The Book: Ya rubuta 'Kitab fi'l-qarastun' (The Book of the Steelyard), babban aiki a kan mechanics da kuma ka'idojin levers da daidaito (equilibrium).
What religion did Thabit ibn Qurra follo: Wani addini ne Thabit ibn Qurra ya bi?
He was a member of the Sabian religious: Ya kasance mamba na kungiyar addini ta Sabian daga Harran, kungiyar arna ta Hellenistic wadda ke girmama taurari da jikin sama (celestial bodies). Wannan galibi yana haifar da rikici da hukumomin Musulunci na rikau.
Amicable numbers are two different numbe: Amicable numbers wasu lambobi ne guda biyu daban-daban wadanda ke da alaka ta yadda hadin gwiwar rarraba na kowanne ya kasance daidai da daya lambar. Dokar Thabit tsari ne na gaba daya wanda ya taimaka wajen gano irin wadannan lambobi.
Was his theory of trepidation correct?: Shin ka'idarsa ta trepidation daidai ce?
No, the theory of trepidation was later: A'a, ka'idar trepidation daga baya an musanya ta da fahimta mai inganci ta uniform precession. Sai dai, ta kasance yunkuri mai mahimmanci da tasiri don bayyana bambance-bambancen lura na zamaninsa.
Born Fátimih Baraghání in Qazvin, Persia: An haife ta a matsayin Fátimih Baraghání a Qazvin, Persia.
Becomes one of the first followers of th: Ta zama daya daqun mabiya farko na Bab, inda aka amince da ita a matsayin Wasika ta 17 ta Rayayyu (17th Letter of the Living).
Attends the Conference of Badasht, where: Ta halarci Taron Badasht, inda ta cire lullubinta (veil), wanda ke nuna rabuwa da baya.
Placed under house arrest due to her inf: An sanya ta karkashin tsarewa a gida (house arrest) saboda koyarwarta mai tasiri.
Executed by strangulation in a garden in: An kashe ta ta hanyar shake ta a wani lambu da ke Tehran saboda bangaskiyarta ta Babi.
Became one of the first major advocates: Ta zama daya daqun manyan masu fada a kan hakkin mata a Gabas ta Tsakiya, tana kalubalantar ka'idojin addini da na al'umma.
Was the only woman designated as a 'Lett: Ta kasance mace daya tilo da aka nada a matsayin 'Letter of the Living,' mabiya farko na Bab, wadda ta tsara akidar Babi ta farko.
Authored powerful mystical and revolutio: Ta rubuta wakoki masu karfi na ruhaniya da na juyin juya hali wadanda ke ci gaba da zaburar da masu karatu da masu fada yau.
Why is she called Tahirih?: Me yasa ake kiran ta Tahirih?
The title 'Tahirih' (meaning 'The Pure O: An ba ta lakabin 'Tahirih' (mai nufin 'Mai Tsarki') a Taron Badasht, wanda ya amince da matsayinta na ruhaniya da tsarkin ruhi. Hanyoyin bayanai sun danganta ba da lakabin ko dai ga Bab ko kuma Baha'u'llah.
Did she ever meet the Báb in person?: Shin ta taba haduwa da Bab da kanta?
No, she never met the Báb. Their entire: A'a, ba ta taba haduwa da Bab ba. Daukacin alakar tasu ta kasance ta hanyar wasiku da rahotannin sauran mabiya ne, duk da akka ta zama daya daqun shahararrun mabiyansa.
In 19th-century Persia, a woman appearin: A kasar Persia ta karni na 19, mace ta bayyana ba tare da lullubi ba a gaban maza ya kasance mataki mai zafi da ban tsoro. Ya nuna rabuwa da gangan da dokar Musulunci da al'ada, yana shelanta sabbin dokokin ruhaniya da na al'umma na tsarin Babi, wadanda suka hada da daidaito mai girma tsakanin maza da mata.
Born as Muhammad bin Suleyman, likely in: An haife shi a matsayin Muhammad bin Suleyman, wataƙila a yankin kasar Iraq ta yanzu (Karbala ko Hillah).
Receives a comprehensive education, mast: Ya sami ilimi mai zurfi, inda ya kware a harsunan Azerbaijani, Farsi, da Larabci, tare da theology da lissafi.
The Ottoman Empire under Suleiman the Ma: Daular Usmaniyya karkashin Suleiman the Magnificent ta kwace Baghdad daga hannun Safavids, wanda ya sauya tsarin siyasa na rayuwar Fuzuli.
Composes his masterpiece, the romantic e: Ya rubuta babban aikinsa, watau wakar tarihi ta soyayya 'Leylâ vü Mecnûn' (Layla da Majnun) a harshen Azerbaijani Turkic.
Writes the famous 'Şikâyetnâme' (The Boo: Ya rubuta shahararren 'Şikâyetnâme' (The Book of Complaint), aikin zantuka na barkwanci yana nuna adawa da rashin samun kudin tallafi na gwamnati da aka yi masa alkawari.
Dies during a plague outbreak in Karbala: Ya mutu lokacin bullar cutar annoba a Karbala, inda yake aiki a matsayin mai kula da masallacin Imam Husayn.
He composed extensive collections of poe: Ya rubuta manyan tarin wakoki (divans) a harsunan Azerbaijani, Farsi, da Larabci, wanda ke nuna gwanintarsa ta harshe da waka da ba ta da tsara.
He authored the definitive Azerbaijani v: Ya rubuta siffar Azerbaijani ta musamman ta shahararren labarin soyayya na Gabas ta Tsakiya, wanda ya zama ginshikin adabin Turkic.
Pioneer of the Azerbaijani Literary Lang: Majagaba na Harshen Adabi na Azerbaijani
He elevated the Azerbaijani Turkic langu: Ya daga harshen Azerbaijani Turkic zuwa babban matsayi na adabi, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tsararraki na mawaƙa a daukacin duniyar Turkic.
Why did he choose the pen name 'Fuzûlî'?: Me yasa ya zabi sunan bogi 'Fuzûlî'?
He chose it because he believed no one e: Ya zabi shi ne saboda ya yi amanna cewa babu wani da zai so shi, wanda ya tabbatar da keɓantuwarsa. Sunan yana da ma'anar daban-daban, ciki har da 'mara ladabi' ko 'mara mahimmanci,' amma kuma yana iya nuna inganci mafi girma, wanda ke nuna siffarsa ta fasaha mai sarkakiya.
His most celebrated work is 'Leylâ vü Me: Aikinsa da aka fi girmamawa shi ne 'Leylâ vü Mecnûn' (Layla da Majnun), wakar tarihi da ke ba da labarin soyayya mai ban tausayi wadda ta wuce duniyar jiki, yana hada sha'awar duniya da sufanci.
While not formally initiated into a spec: Kodayake bai shiga cikin wani tsari na Sufi na musamman a hukumance ba, wakokinsa suna da zurfin ra'ayoyin Sufanci, kamar bacewar kai a cikin Allah (fana), radadin rabuwa da Masoyi (Allah), da kuma amfani da soyayya da giya a matsayin alama ga jin dadin ruhaniya.
Born in Paj, a village near Tus in Khora: An haife shi a Paj, kauye kusa da Tus a Khorasan, Daular Sasanian (Iran ta yanzu).
Begins composing the Shahnameh, his life: Ya fara rubuta Shahnameh, aikin rayuwarsa, don kiyaye tarihi da tatsuniyoyi na Persia.
Completes the first version of the Shahn: Ya kammala fasalin farko na Shahnameh sannan ya gabatar da ita ga Sultan Mahmud na Ghazni, wanda ya biya shi kudi kalilan.
Dies in his hometown of Tus, reportedly: Ya mutu a garinsu na Tus, an ce a cikin talauci, amma ya bar aikin da zai bayyana al'adar Farsi gaba daya.
He created the 'Shahnameh' (Book of King: Ya samar da 'Shahnameh' (Book of Kings), wakar tarihi mafi tsawo a duniya ta marubuci guda daya, wadda take da tsakiya ga al'ada da asalin Farsi.
His near-exclusive use of Persian in the: Amfani da harshen Farsi da ya kusan yi a cikin Shahnameh ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen farfado da daidaita harshen bayan tsawon karni na ikon Larabci.
Why is the Shahnameh so important?: Me yasa Shahnameh take da matukar mahimmanci?
It is the national epic of Greater Iran,: Ta kasance wakar tarihi ta kasa ta Greater Iran, tana kiyaye tatsuniyoyinta, tarihin kafin Musulunci, da harshe. Ana kallon ta a matsayin babban aikin adabi na duniya da kuma ginshikin asalin Farsi.
No. Despite his noble birth, he spent hi: A'a. Duk da asalin sarautarsa, ya kwashe dukiyar iyalinsa a kan aikinsa sannan, kamar yadda tatsuniya ta nuna, ya mutu a cikin talauci bayan mai goyon bayansa, Sultan Mahmud ya watsar da shi.
It consists of over 50,000 rhyming coupl: Ta kunshi ma'aurata na waka (rhyming couplets) sama da 50,000, wanda ya mayar da ita fiye da ninki biyu na tsawon Iliad da Odyssey na Homer a hade.
Born Ahmed Muhiddin Piri in Gallipoli, O: An haifi Ahmed Muhiddin Piri a Gallipoli, Daular Usmaniyya.
Begins his seafaring career, sailing wit: Ya fara aikinsa na jirgin ruwa, yana tafiya tare da kawunsa, admiral Kemal Reis.
Compiles his first world map, famously k: Ya tattara taswirar duniya ta farko, wadda aka fi sani da taswirar Piri Reis, sannan ya gabatar da ita ga Sultan Selim I.
Completes his 'Kitab-ı Bahriye' (Book of: Ya kammala 'Kitab-ı Bahriye' (Book of Navigation), cikakken taswirar Tekun Mediterranean.
Creates his second world map, of which o: Ya samar da taswirar duniya ta biyu, wadda yanki kalilan dinta da ke nuna Tsakiya da Arewacin Amurka ya tsira.
Appointed as the Reis (Admiral) of the O: An nada shi a matsayin Reis (Admiral) na sojojin ruwa na Ottoman a Tekun Indian Ocean.
Executed in Cairo on charges of treason: An kashe shi a Alkahira a kan zargin cin amana da karbar hanci bayan kewaye Hormuz.
One of the oldest surviving world maps t: Daya daqun taswirorin duniya mafi tsufa da suka tsira da ke nuna kasashen Amurka, wadda aka sani saboda cikakken bayani da kuma hanyoyin bayanai na sirri.
A comprehensive nautical atlas of the Me: Cikakken taswirar ruwa na Mediterranean, wanda ke dauke da cikakkun taswirori, bayanin tashar jiragen ruwa, da hanyoyin tafiya.
How accurate is the Piri Reis map?: Yaya ingancin taswirar Piri Reis yake?
The map is remarkably accurate for its t: Taswirar tana da inganci kwarai ga zamaninta game da iyakokin teku na Turai da Arewacin Afirka. Bayaninta na kasashen Amurka da wani yanki na kudu da ake zargi (Antarctica) batun muhawara ne mai zafi da tunani tsakanin masana tarihi da na taswira.
Why was Piri Reis executed?: Me yasa aka kashe Piri Reis?
He was executed on charges of treason an: An kashe shi a kan zargin cin amana da karbar hanci bayan ya janye kewaye birnin Hormuz na Portuguese sannan ya koma Egypt da dakarunsa, wani mataki da abokan gabansa na siyasa suka fassara a matsayin guduwa da rashawa.
'Reis' is a Turkish title, equivalent to: "Reis" lakabi ne na Turkish, daidai da kyaftin ko admiral. Ainihin sunan Piri Reis shi ne Ahmed Muhiddin Piri.
An haife shi a Rayy (Iran ta yanzu).
Becomes the fifth Abbasid Caliph after t: Ya zama Caliph na biyar na Abbasid bayan mutuwar dan uwansa al-Hadi.
Establishes or greatly expands the House: Ya kafa ko kuma ya fadada House of Wisdom (Bayt al-Hikma) sosai a Baghdad.
Launches a major campaign against the By: Ya kaddamar da babban yakin soja yaki da Daular Byzantine, inda ya isa Bosporus.
